subject: Re: FW: Introduction: Ayrton Mansi | Broadbeach Development Project
snippet: Hi Ryan, I sent the template email to them about 2 weeks ago, putting them on notice and to maintain the status quo. Apart from that, I have only recieved some informal nonsense direct with Freddie.
